summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ExitReadinessCard premium financial scoring UI upgrade. All 11 required features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: SVG gradient progress ring - linearGradient with id='scoreGradient' verified (orange→gold gradient stops: #F97316, #FB923C)
Animated stroke draw on mount - motion.circle with strokeDasharray and strokeDashoffset animation verified
Score display format - 52/100 with readiness label 'Partially Exit-Ready' below score verified
Primary Bottleneck insight - shows lowest scoring category 'Operational Transferability' (10%) verified
Bottleneck warning style - bg-amber-50 amber background with ring-1 ring-amber-200/60 verified
Category scores current/max format - ['20/30', '9/20', '2/20', '6/15', '15/15'] all categories verified
Gradient progress bars - 6 bars with bg-gradient-to-r (from-emerald-400, from-blue-400, from-amber-400, from-red-400) verified
Critical Area tag - appears for Operational Transferability (10% < 30%) with bg-red-100 text-red-600 verified
Stronger card shadow - rgba(11, 77, 187, 0.08/0.15) blue-tinted shadow verified in inline style
Percentile ARR range display - 'Top 51% of SaaS in your ARR range ($1M+)' tier label verified
Category breakdown expand/collapse - detailed point breakdown (+10 pts, +4 pts, etc.) verified

SVG_gradient.implementation: linearGradient id='scoreGradient' with dynamic gradient.start/end colors

animated_stroke.implementation: motion.circle with strokeDasharray={circumference} and animated strokeDashoffset

score_format.implementation: score/100 format with readiness_label displayed below

primary_bottleneck.implementation: sortedCategories by percentage, lowest becomes primary_bottleneck

critical_area_tag.implementation: isCritical = percentage < 30, shows bg-red-100 text-red-600 tag

critical_code_review_comments: ExitReadinessCard.jsx implementation correctly matches all requirements
getScoreGradient() correctly returns orange→gold for scores 55-69 as specified
primary_bottleneck detection correctly identifies lowest percentage category
ARR tier labels correctly map to ranges (<$25K, $25K-$50K, $50K-$100K, $100K-$500K, $500K-$1M, $1M+)
All interactive elements have proper hover/transition states
seed_data_creation: Updated valuation val_0b6c1d90d0ec ownership for testing
